violations.text: Large wooden paddle was observed with a crack and splinters. Wooden utensils must be smooth and easily cleanable. Wooden utensils that can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized must be discarded. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
Employee observed eating on the food line at the prep unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
Debris observed in ice inside the ice machine. Ice was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Black beans were observed held at 117 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Beans were disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Turkey and ham deli meat observed held at 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Inspector observed scoops with the handles stored touching dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
Toaster oven located on the service line was not in good repair (peeling outside covering). Toaster oven taken out of service. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -Topping cart/table; -Toaster ovens; -Ice machine vents. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
One wood paddle was not in good repair, cracked with frayed edges. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit next to hot hold unit have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Ansul system pipes above the stove and grill have an accumulation of grease and oil. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
One light beneath the hood was nonfunctional during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
